'''Ranat''' [[Language/Legends|language]] was the native language of the [[Ranat/Legends|Ranat]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Rydar II]]. It had a written form,<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" /> only known by the Ranats themselves.

Although Ranats could learn other languages, such as [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], most of them could not find any use for that.

{{Language-stub}}
